basic_details.job_title: RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI) Recruitment 2026: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute has released the official notification for 1 Yoga Therapist posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Andaman And Nicobar Islands. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: As per Govt. Rules (Relaxable in case of SC/ST/OBC)
age_limit.details: Age as on 25-07-2026. Age relaxation will be applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks and 2 years experience, Graduate with Diploma in Yoga (1 year) with 55% marks and 5 years experience, Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate of Yoga Certification Board (YCB)
qualification.details: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized University and 2 years' experience in Yoga Therapy in a reputed Institute/Hospital. OR Any Graduate from a recognized University established under UGC Act with a Diploma in Yoga (minimum one-year duration) after graduation with 55% marks and 5 years' practical experience in Yoga in a reputed Yoga Institute/Hospital. Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate of Yoga Certification Board (YCB). Demonstration skills in Yogic practices (skill test will be conducted). Desirable: Working experience in traditional Yoga Therapy from an institute of national repute/Hospital. Knowledge of computer operations. Working knowledge of Hindi, English and Sanskrit. Experience in research projects related to Yoga Therapy/case studies. Fluency in English.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RARI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RARI Yoga Therapist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RARI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RARI Yoga Therapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RARI Yoga Therapist Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized University and 2 years' experience in Yoga Therapy in a reputed Institute/Hospital. OR Any Graduate from a recognized University established under UGC Act with a Diploma in Yoga (minimum one-year duration) after graduation with 55% marks and 5 years' practical experience in Yoga in a reputed Yoga Institute/Hospital. Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate of Yoga Certification Board (YCB). Demonstration skills in Yogic practices (skill test will be conducted). Desirable: Working experience in traditional Yoga Therapy from an institute of national repute/Hospital. Knowledge of computer operations. Working knowledge of Hindi, English and Sanskrit. Experience in research projects related to Yoga Therapy/case studies. Fluency in English.

content_sections.heading: RARI Yoga Therapist Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Age as on 25-07-2026. Age relaxation will be applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government Rules.

content_sections.heading: RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RARI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the RARI Yoga Therapist position is 22nd July 2026. Ensure you complete the application process well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Yoga Therapist post at the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI) as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Yoga Therapist role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with 55% marks and 2 years' experience, or a Graduate with a Diploma in Yoga (1 year) and 55% marks with 5 years' experience, along with a Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate from YCB.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Yoga Therapist position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 38,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this RARI Yoga Therapist recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit is to be considered as of 25th July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Yoga Therapist role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Hybrid Interview and a Skill Test to assess the candidates' suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this RARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Yoga Therapist is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the Regional Ayurveda Research Institute located in Sri Vijaya Puram (Port Blair), Andaman and Nicobar Islands, with pincode 744112.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Andaman and Nicobar Islands apply?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Candidates from other regions are generally eligible to apply for government jobs unless specific domicile requirements are mentioned.
